title: 有馬記念の後に・世紀末の始まり

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And that's all she wrote for the Arima Kinen! Our
all-star lineup today has given us a race that we
won't soon forget!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're witnessing the Golden Generation being
supplanted by this year's newcomers, led by T.M.
Opera O! What a spectacular event!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! As far as opening acts for a
generational clash go, I suppose this will do.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Grass... I have observed very well the
footprints of your history with every step you've
taken.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The time is nigh. I, the Overlord, will carry on in
your stead.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In the next year, this competition of ours will be
settled once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Without question—I humbly accept your
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Really... Opera O, you're so much stronger than I
thought!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And this is just the Classics! Come next year, I
can't even imagine what's gonna happen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh. It'll be beyond your wildest dreams. I can tell
you that much.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The path of an overlord is never-ending, and I'm
on a journey to become the Centurial Overlord,
ruler of all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! Haaaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ha—gahagh! Cough! Cough!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! It appears T.M. Opera O has begun to
choke!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! Why is there still commentary?

The star of today's intense competition both
inspires the crowd and brings them to laughter.
Finally, we make our leave from the course.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With that, my classic year has concluded. I
appreciate your diligent work, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But thus closes this act of the heroic tale of the
young Prince T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A new one is to begin in the next year when I will
be a senior.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It shall be an epic, detailing my clash with the
older generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No longer will I seek their counsel through bouts.
choice_data_list:
You never planned to ask for their help in the
first place.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Excellent point!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am the Overlord. I was born to have this role!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I were to ask for anything, it would be the
money in your wallet. Hah ha ha!

I know that was a joke, but I can't seem to laugh
along.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer. In order to bring about the
resplendent future in which I rule over the next
generation...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What race would you consider best? Give me the
name of one worthy of the Overlord.

A senior year race in spring comes to mind. In
fact, the choice is obvious.
choice_data_list: How about the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho! Hark, the beautiful sound I yearned to hear—the king of all races!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It boasts notoriety and prestige! A majestic
3200-meter parade with the greatest racer at the
helm!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A fitting rite of passage for this new ruler, to be
sure!

It's set. Deciding on a goal for next year was a
breeze.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's settled. Our march toward victory begins at
next year's spring Tenno Sho!
